title: PhiDelay Shared-Recurrent LM (3.23 bpb, 6.84MB)
author: bahman2017

data.description: Uses 3 physical transformer blocks repeated 4 times each for effective depth 12 with learned recurrence gates.
Replaces self-attention with a lightweight multi-head delay mixer using content-dependent adaptive delays.
Input and output embeddings are shared.

novel_contributions: Replaces self-attention with a PhiDelayLayer multi-head delay mixer.
Introduces recurrent weight sharing with learned per-block recurrence gates.
Uses 3 physical transformer blocks repeated 4 times to achieve effective depth 12.
Demonstrates that training duration was the dominant bottleneck for BPB improvement.
Shows that int8+zlib roundtrip is essentially lossless for this model.
Achieves a compact 6.84 MB artifact under the 16 MB cap.
